mechanics.rows_excerpt: TRAITS Link Attributes when calculating skill advancement for the skii (see p. 211). The cost of Natural Aptitude is Character Point for non: combat skill; or 2 Character Points for combat skill (as deter mined by the gamemaster). character may never have more than one Natural Aptitude without the gamemaster' specific permission (Clan trueborns are notable exception to this rule). Natural Aptitude must be purchased separately for Sub skills with the exception of Bureaucracy; Protocol and Streetwise In these cases_ the aptitude is considered to cover all regional subskills Of course separate subskills for each region must be acquired as usual, but the aptitude applies to them_ For example character with Natural Aptitude / Streetwise and the skills Streetwise / Luthien and Streetwise /Capellan Confederation would be considered have Natural Aptitude with both subskills_ NIGHT BLINDNESS Value: The character has very poor night vision_ such that all tar get number modifiers for darkness are doubled, NIGHT VISION Cost: character with this trait has better-than average night vision, although he is not actually able to see in complete dark- ness. This trait reduces the target number modifiers associated with darkness by half (round down). lost foot reduces the character' $ effective RFL by and cuts all movement rates in half. Iost leg reduces the charac ter'$ RFL half (round down); makes running; sprinting and evading movement impossible; ad cuts walking movement to one-quarter the normal speed: Note also that if the lost Mimo is replaced by tully func tional permanent prosthetic (Type 5), the loss is effectively cured_ and it is worth no Character Points_ OWNS VEHICLE Cost: Through inheritance, hard work or sheer luck the character actually owns his BattleMech (or other vehicle) if he spends a additional points on it. Vehicle Costs Owning vehicle can be an expensive proposition_ Without the Owns Vehicle Trait, these expenses are taken care of by the unit that owns the vehicle With this trait, the responsibility of maintenance and upkeep falls on the player character' shoul: ders Basic maintenance for any vehicle except spacecraft costs 100 C-bills per week not counting
